case_title: SUNEEL RATAN ET AL VS. RANIA SHWEB

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RATAN, SUNEEL RATAN, KRISTEN AS TO DEFENDANT SHWEB, RANIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $125.00- SERVED FEB-27-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHWEB, RANIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2016 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF KRISTEN RATAN WAS PRESENT. SUNEEL RATAN WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RATAN, SUNEEL RATAN, KRISTEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHWEB, RANIA DEFENDANT'S VACANT ILLEGAL DOWNSTAIRS UNIT HAS BEEN REMOVED FROM THE RESIDENTIAL MARKET PRIOR TO THE NOTICE OF RENT INCREASE AND IS NO LONGER AVAILABLE FOR SEPARATE RESIDENTIAL USE. AS A SINGLE FAMILY DWELLING, THE RESTRICTIONS IMPOSED BY THE SAN FRANCISCO RESIDENTIAL RENT ORDINANCE DO NOT APPLY. THE ORDER FOR OVERPAYMENT OF RENT IN RENT BOARD CASE T-151421 IS VACATED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
